zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice FitzWilliam於1115年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham31歲，母親Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall29歲。她於大約1135年與Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1162年在英國素瑞傑千享年47歲，埋葬在英國素瑞傑千。

zh-hans.Cardinham, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾卡迪納姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice FitzWilliam于1115年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham31岁，母亲Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall29岁。她于大约1135年与Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1162年在英国素瑞傑千享年47岁，埋葬在英国素瑞傑千。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice FitzWilliam was born in 1115, in Cornwall, England, her father, William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham, was 31 and her mother, Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall, was 29. She married Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall about 1135, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1162, in Chertsey, Surrey, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Chertsey, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice FitzWilliam est née en 1115, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall environ 1135, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1162, à Chertsey, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Chertsey, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice FitzWilliam 1115 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham 31 und ihre Mutter Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall 29. Sie hat um 1135 in Cornwall, England Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1162 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Chertsey, Surrey, England und wurde in Chertsey, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice FitzWilliam è nata il nel 1115 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall circa 1135, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1162, nel Chertsey, Surrey, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Chertsey, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice FitzWilliamが1115年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinhamは31歳，母Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwallは29歳であった。約1135年にイギリスコルンワルでReginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1162年にイギリススリーチェルトセイで47歳で死去し，イギリススリーチェルトセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice FitzWilliam(이)가 1115년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1135년 영국 코른월에서 Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1162년 영국 수리 처츠이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 처츠이에 묻혔다.

mn.Cardinham, Cornwall, England: Kardhinan, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice FitzWilliam nasceu em 1115, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall aproximadamente 1135, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1162, em Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice FitzWilliam родилась в 1115 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall около 1135 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1162 г. в местности чирци, сурри, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности чирци, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice FitzWilliam nació en 1115, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzRichard Lord of Cardinham, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Annora de Mortaigne of Cornwall, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall aproximadamente 1135, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1162, en Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra.
